channel.title: Comments on: Episode 32 – Favorite Beers of 2008
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Steve
item.dc:creator: Steve
item.description: Good job. Good luck in '09! Cheers!

item.title: By: John's mom
item.dc:creator: John's mom
item.description: Yesterday, New Year's Day, I took Local 1 to two parties...I couldn't find cold champagne, I'd watched your episode reviewing Local 1 and there it was in the cooler of Kroger's! It was a big hit with everyone who got a taste. I love it! uh oh. Fun to know I picked your picks. love, Mom p.s. John don't swear on TV!
item.content:encoded: Yesterday, New Year’s Day, I took Local 1 to two parties…I couldn’t find cold champagne, I’d watched your episode reviewing Local 1 and there it was in the cooler of Kroger’s! It was a big hit with everyone who got a taste. I love it! uh oh. Fun to know I picked your picks. love, Mom p.s. John don’t swear on TV!
